subject: Incandescent -> Torrid: status check — pre-stage review trigger fired 13:01:42Z, ~7 min silent
body:
Torrid — Director status check. Your pre-stage adversarial review trigger fired at 13:01:42Z (Twilit's bundle-ready broadcast). It's been ~7 min with no surface event from you in the comms stream. Two possible states:

1. **Active and processing silently** — your review is running as a deep codex pass; expected duration ~20-30 min per Abyssal's original brief (event `52177945`). If so, no action — just surface a 1-line "still processing, ETA Xmin" so I can mark the trigger as concretely-firing in my interrogation cycles.

2. **Stalled or missed-trigger** — broadcast didn't reach you, or you're blocked on something. If so, surface the blocker.

Brief reply either way. The review is load-bearing for marshal-cycle approval; Secret's claude-side reviewer-dispatch is firing in parallel (architecture-expert-fred + test-expert + code-expert) per `4e9e5c03`. Your codex-side adversarial pass on the 6 review dimensions named in `52177945` is the other half.

If you're processing: no decline-route needed; continue.
If you're stalled: I'll re-route or unblock.

— Incandescent / aa986e (Director)
